$comment: Sentinel-based hub->orphan link injection plan for #296. Each row: source_hub (post containing sentinel), target_orphan (link destination), sentinel_phrase (exact unique substring in hub.content), rewrite (sentinel + injected markdown link). Idempotency: skip if /never-hungover/<orphan> already in hub. Skipped rows have skip:true with reason. 28 active + 2 skipped (no clean natural sentinel) per S3 plan; 28 hub->orphan injections target 28 distinct orphans.

rows.anchor_text: alcohol's effect on eye health and vision
rows.sentinel_phrase: The pancreas can suffer from alcohol-induced pancreatitis, a painful inflammation that impairs its ability to produce digestive enzymes and hormones like insulin.
rows.rewrite: The pancreas can suffer from alcohol-induced pancreatitis, a painful inflammation that impairs its ability to produce digestive enzymes and hormones like insulin. Even the eyes are not spared — chronic drinking accelerates dry eye, cataracts, and macular degeneration ([alcohol's effect on eye health and vision](/never-hungover/alcohol-eye-health-complete-vision-impact-guide-2025)).

rows.sentinel_phrase: Chronic heavy drinking can cause neurodegeneration, leading to brain shrinkage, cognitive decline, memory impairment, and an increased risk of dementia.
rows.rewrite: Chronic heavy drinking can cause neurodegeneration, leading to brain shrinkage, cognitive decline, memory impairment, and an increased risk of dementia. See our deep dive on [long-term cognitive decline from alcohol](/never-hungover/alcohol-brain-health-long-term-impact-analysis-2025) for the full mechanistic breakdown.

rows.sentinel_phrase: The mechanisms involve DNA damage, oxidative stress, and altered hormone levels.
rows.rewrite: The mechanisms involve DNA damage, oxidative stress, and altered hormone levels — the latter explored in detail in our guide to [thyroid and hormonal disruption](/never-hungover/alcohol-thyroid-hormonal-disruption-2025) caused by chronic alcohol exposure.

rows.sentinel_phrase: Physical activity improves circulation, reduces inflammation, boosts cellular repair mechanisms, and enhances overall cellular health, including mitochondrial function.
rows.rewrite: Physical activity improves circulation, reduces inflammation, boosts cellular repair mechanisms, and enhances overall cellular health, including mitochondrial function. Together these adaptations restore [metabolic flexibility and aging](/never-hungover/alcohol-and-metabolic-flexibility-energy-system-optimization-2025) resilience that alcohol systematically erodes.

rows.skip_reason: Hub has no altitude/elevation/cabin content. Forcing a link would read awkwardly. Defer to cluster-formalize (#297) which adds spoke->pillar reciprocity.

rows.sentinel_phrase: Unlike ADH, the MEOS pathway is inducible, meaning its activity increases with chronic alcohol exposure.
rows.rewrite: Unlike ADH, the MEOS pathway is inducible, meaning its activity increases with chronic alcohol exposure. Personal variability in ADH and ALDH alleles is also why [genetic testing for alcohol metabolism](/never-hungover/alcohol-metabolism-genetic-testing-complete-personalized-health-guide-2025) reveals such different tolerance profiles between individuals.

rows.sentinel_phrase: Understanding these mechanisms, particularly alcohol pharmacokinetics--the study of how the body absorbs, distributes, metabolizes, and eliminates alcohol--is not merely an academic exercise.
rows.rewrite: Understanding these mechanisms, particularly alcohol pharmacokinetics--the study of how the body absorbs, distributes, metabolizes, and eliminates alcohol--is not merely an academic exercise. It has direct, measurable effects on physical output: see [athletes and alcohol performance](/never-hungover/athletes-alcohol-sport-specific-performance-guide-2025) for sport-specific recovery and training-day guidance.

rows.sentinel_phrase: The truth is, for healthy individuals, the liver is perfectly capable of handling the body's detoxification needs without external intervention from specialized 'cleanses' or 'detox' diets.
rows.rewrite: The truth is, for healthy individuals, the liver is perfectly capable of handling the body's detoxification needs without external intervention from specialized 'cleanses' or 'detox' diets. What does help is targeted [post-drinking nutritional recovery](/never-hungover/alcohol-recovery-nutrition-complete-healing-protocol-2025) — replenishing depleted micronutrients and supporting the metabolic pathways that already work.

rows.sentinel_phrase: One such compound is Dihydromyricetin (DHM), a flavonoid primarily extracted from the plant *Hovenia dulcis* (Japanese Raisin Tree).
rows.rewrite: One such compound is Dihydromyricetin (DHM), a flavonoid primarily extracted from the plant *Hovenia dulcis* (Japanese Raisin Tree). For the full evidence stack on [DHM and liver-protective supplements](/never-hungover/liver-health-alcohol-supplements-dhm-2025), including comparative outcomes, see our dedicated review.

rows.anchor_text: NAC versus DHM for liver protection
rows.sentinel_phrase: Oxidative stress, an imbalance between free radicals and antioxidants in the body, plays a significant role in the progression of various liver diseases.
rows.rewrite: Oxidative stress, an imbalance between free radicals and antioxidants in the body, plays a significant role in the progression of various liver diseases. Two of the most-studied antioxidant interventions are NAC and DHM — read [NAC versus DHM for liver protection](/never-hungover/nac-vs-dhm-which-antioxidant-better-liver-protection-2025) for a side-by-side mechanism comparison.

rows.sentinel_phrase: **📅 Can you take DHM daily?** No - DHM is for occasional use (2-3 times per week max).
rows.rewrite: **📅 Can you take DHM daily?** No - DHM is for occasional use (2-3 times per week max). For the full safety review, see our guide to [daily DHM long-term use](/never-hungover/can-you-take-dhm-every-day-long-term-guide-2025).

rows.sentinel_phrase: For all-day drinking events, split your dose: half before starting, half midway through.
rows.rewrite: For all-day drinking events, split your dose: half before starting, half midway through. For more split-dose and pre-event variations, see our complete [DHM timing and dosing schedule](/never-hungover/when-to-take-dhm-timing-guide-2025).

rows.anchor_text: maximum DHM protocol for heavy drinking
rows.sentinel_phrase: For heavy drinking sessions (7+ drinks), use the full 600mg dose.
rows.rewrite: For heavy drinking sessions (7+ drinks), use the full 600mg dose. For binge-drinking and stacked-protection scenarios, see our [maximum DHM protocol for heavy drinking](/never-hungover/heavy-drinking-maximum-protection-dhm-2025) breakdown.

rows.anchor_text: budget DHM dosing on a student wallet
rows.sentinel_phrase: Now that you know your optimal dosage, find a quality DHM supplement that matches your needs.
rows.rewrite: Now that you know your optimal dosage, find a quality DHM supplement that matches your needs. On a tight budget? See our [budget DHM dosing on a student wallet](/never-hungover/broke-college-student-budget-dhm-2025) cost-per-use guide.

rows.sentinel_phrase: These imbalances can contribute to headaches, dizziness, fatigue, and muscle weakness.
rows.rewrite: These imbalances can contribute to headaches, dizziness, fatigue, and muscle weakness. For a deeper look at [the science of alcohol headaches](/never-hungover/alcohol-headache-why-it-happens-how-to-prevent-2025), including vasodilation and congener pathways, read our dedicated guide.

rows.sentinel_phrase: This fluid loss, coupled with sweating and vomiting, can result in dehydration and an imbalance of essential electrolytes like sodium, potassium, and magnesium.
rows.rewrite: This fluid loss, coupled with sweating and vomiting, can result in dehydration and an imbalance of essential electrolytes like sodium, potassium, and magnesium. If you're already nauseated, jump to our [fast nausea relief protocol](/never-hungover/hangover-nausea-complete-guide-fast-stomach-relief-2025) for symptom-specific steps.

rows.sentinel_phrase: For example, individuals with less efficient ALDH2 enzymes will experience a more rapid and severe buildup of toxic acetaldehyde, leading to more pronounced hangover symptoms.
rows.rewrite: For example, individuals with less efficient ALDH2 enzymes will experience a more rapid and severe buildup of toxic acetaldehyde, leading to more pronounced hangover symptoms. When symptoms are severe enough to disrupt the day, our [emergency hangover protocol](/never-hungover/emergency-hangover-protocol-2025) walks through a 90-minute recovery sequence.

rows.sentinel_phrase: Unlike activated charcoal's passive and ineffective attempt to bind alcohol in the gut, DHM actively enhances your body's natural ability to process alcohol and protect against its effects.
rows.rewrite: Unlike activated charcoal's passive and ineffective attempt to bind alcohol in the gut, DHM actively enhances your body's natural ability to process alcohol and protect against its effects. For the broader 'natural-living' angle, see our [evidence-based natural hangover prevention](/never-hungover/organic-natural-hangover-prevention-clean-living-2025) guide.

rows.sentinel_phrase: Combine these with common-sense strategies like hydration, proper nutrition, and moderation for the best results.
rows.rewrite: Combine these with common-sense strategies like hydration, proper nutrition, and moderation for the best results. For more advanced optimization, see our [biohacking alcohol tolerance](/never-hungover/biohacking-alcohol-tolerance-science-based-strategies-2025) science-based strategy stack.

rows.sentinel_phrase: It's the immune system's immediate response to injury, infection, or irritation, characterized by redness, swelling, heat, and pain.
rows.rewrite: It's the immune system's immediate response to injury, infection, or irritation, characterized by redness, swelling, heat, and pain.
